briefdescription.para: Write a message to SMBus peripheral.
Read a message from SMBus peripheral.
SMBus read / write direction.

description.para: SMBus Specification defines the following SMBus protocols operations

briefdescription.para: SMBus Quick protocol is a very simple command with no data sent or received.

detaileddescription.para: Peripheral may denote only R/W bit, which can still be used for the peripheral management, for example to switch peripheral On/Off. Quick protocol can also be used for peripheral devices scanning.

briefdescription.para: SMBus Byte protocol can send or receive one byte of data.
SMBus Byte Data protocol sends the first byte (command) followed by read or write one byte.
SMBus Word Data protocol sends the first byte (command) followed by read or write two bytes.
SMBus Process Call protocol is Write Word followed by Read Word.

detaileddescription.para: It is named so because the command sends data and waits for the peripheral to return a reply.

briefdescription.para: SMBus Block protocol reads or writes a block of data up to 32 bytes.

detaileddescription.para: The Count byte specifies the amount of data.

briefdescription.para: SMBus Block Write - Block Read Process Call protocol is Block Write followed by Block Read.

description.para: The following parameters describe the functionality of the SMBus device

briefdescription.para: Peripheral to act as Controller.
Support Packet Error Code (PEC) checking.
Support Host Notify functionality.
Support SMBALERT signal functionality.

description.para: The following addresses are reserved by SMBus specification

briefdescription.para: Alert Response Address (ARA)

detaileddescription.para: A broadcast address used by the system host as part of the Alert Response Protocol.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* smbus_callback_handler_t) (const struct device *dev, struct smbus_callback *cb, uint8_t addr)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, struct smbus_callback *cb, uint8_t addr)
memberdef.name: smbus_callback_handler_t

briefdescription.para: Define SMBus callback handler function signature.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance.
Structure smbus_callback owning this handler.
Address of the SMBus peripheral device.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t sent, uint8_t recv)
memberdef.name: smbus_xfer_stats

briefdescription.para: Updates the SMBus stats.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance to update stats for.
Number of bytes sent
Number of bytes received

briefdescription.para: Configure operation of a SMBus host controller.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance.
Bit-packed 32-bit value to the device runtime configuration for the SMBus controller.
If successful.
General input / output error.

briefdescription.para: Get configuration of a SMBus host controller.

detaileddescription.para: This routine provides a way to get current configuration. It is allowed to call the function before smbus_configure, because some SMBus ports can be configured during init process. However, if the SMBus port is not configured, smbus_get_config returns an error.
smbus_get_config can return cached config or probe hardware, but it has to be up to date with current configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance.
Pointer to return bit-packed 32-bit value of the SMBus controller configuration.
If successful.
General input / output error.
If function smbus_get_config() is not implemented by the driver.

briefdescription.para: Add SMBUSALERT callback for a SMBus host controller.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance.
Pointer to a callback structure.
If successful.
General input / output error.
If function smbus_smbalert_set_cb() is not implemented by the driver.

briefdescription.para: Remove SMBUSALERT callback from a SMBus host controller.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance.
Pointer to a callback structure.
If successful.
General input / output error.
If function smbus_smbalert_remove_cb() is not implemented by the driver.

briefdescription.para: Add Host Notify callback for a SMBus host controller.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance.
Pointer to a callback structure.
If successful.
General input / output error.
If function smbus_host_notify_set_cb() is not implemented by the driver.

briefdescription.para: Remove Host Notify callback from a SMBus host controller.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance.
Pointer to a callback structure.
If successful.
General input / output error.
If function smbus_host_notify_remove_cb() is not implemented by the driver.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t addr, enum smbus_direction direction)
memberdef.name: smbus_quick

briefdescription.para: Perform SMBus Quick operation.

detaileddescription.para: This routine provides a generic interface to perform SMBus Quick operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance. driver configured in controller mode.
Address of the SMBus peripheral device.
Direction Read or Write.
If successful.
General input / output error.
If function smbus_quick() is not implemented by the driver.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t addr, uint8_t byte)
memberdef.name: smbus_byte_write

briefdescription.para: Perform SMBus Byte Write operation.

detaileddescription.para: This routine provides a generic interface to perform SMBus Byte Write operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance.
Address of the SMBus peripheral device.
Byte to be sent to the peripheral device.
If successful.
General input / output error.
If function smbus_byte_write() is not implemented by the driver.

briefdescription.para: Perform SMBus Byte Read operation.

detaileddescription.para: This routine provides a generic interface to perform SMBus Byte Read operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance.
Address of the SMBus peripheral device.
Byte received from the peripheral device.
If successful.
General input / output error.
If function smbus_byte_read() is not implemented by the driver.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t addr, uint8_t cmd, uint8_t byte)
memberdef.name: smbus_byte_data_write

briefdescription.para: Perform SMBus Byte Data Write operation.

detaileddescription.para: This routine provides a generic interface to perform SMBus Byte Data Write operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance.
Address of the SMBus peripheral device.
Command byte which is sent to peripheral device first.
Byte to be sent to the peripheral device.
If successful.
General input / output error.
If function smbus_byte_data_write() is not implemented by the driver.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t addr, uint8_t cmd, uint8_t *byte)
memberdef.name: smbus_byte_data_read

briefdescription.para: Perform SMBus Byte Data Read operation.

detaileddescription.para: This routine provides a generic interface to perform SMBus Byte Data Read operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance.
Address of the SMBus peripheral device.
Command byte which is sent to peripheral device first.
Byte received from the peripheral device.
If successful.
General input / output error.
If function smbus_byte_data_read() is not implemented by the driver.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t addr, uint8_t cmd, uint16_t word)
memberdef.name: smbus_word_data_write

briefdescription.para: Perform SMBus Word Data Write operation.

detaileddescription.para: This routine provides a generic interface to perform SMBus Word Data Write operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance.
Address of the SMBus peripheral device.
Command byte which is sent to peripheral device first.
Word (16-bit) to be sent to the peripheral device.
If successful.
General input / output error.
If function smbus_word_data_write() is not implemented by the driver.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t addr, uint8_t cmd, uint16_t *word)
memberdef.name: smbus_word_data_read

briefdescription.para: Perform SMBus Word Data Read operation.

detaileddescription.para: This routine provides a generic interface to perform SMBus Word Data Read operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance.
Address of the SMBus peripheral device.
Command byte which is sent to peripheral device first.
Word (16-bit) received from the peripheral device.
If successful.
General input / output error.
If function smbus_word_data_read() is not implemented by the driver.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t addr, uint8_t cmd, uint16_t send_word, uint16_t *recv_word)
memberdef.name: smbus_pcall

briefdescription.para: Perform SMBus Process Call operation.

detaileddescription.para: This routine provides a generic interface to perform SMBus Process Call operation, which means Write 2 bytes following by Read 2 bytes.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance.
Address of the SMBus peripheral device.
Command byte which is sent to peripheral device first.
Word (16-bit) to be sent to the peripheral device.
Word (16-bit) received from the peripheral device.
If successful.
General input / output error.
If function smbus_pcall() is not implemented by the driver.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t addr, uint8_t cmd, uint8_t count, uint8_t *buf)
memberdef.name: smbus_block_write

briefdescription.para: Perform SMBus Block Write operation.

detaileddescription.para: This routine provides a generic interface to perform SMBus Block Write operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance.
Address of the SMBus peripheral device.
Command byte which is sent to peripheral device first.
Size of the data block buffer. Maximum 32 bytes.
Data block buffer to be sent to the peripheral device.
If successful.
General input / output error.
If function smbus_block_write() is not implemented by the driver.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t addr, uint8_t cmd, uint8_t *count, uint8_t *buf)
memberdef.name: smbus_block_read

briefdescription.para: Perform SMBus Block Read operation.

detaileddescription.para: This routine provides a generic interface to perform SMBus Block Read operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance.
Address of the SMBus peripheral device.
Command byte which is sent to peripheral device first.
Size of the data peripheral sent. Maximum 32 bytes.
Data block buffer received from the peripheral device.
If successful.
General input / output error.
If function smbus_block_read() is not implemented by the driver.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint16_t addr, uint8_t cmd, uint8_t snd_count, uint8_t *snd_buf, uint8_t *rcv_count, uint8_t *rcv_buf)
memberdef.name: smbus_block_pcall

briefdescription.para: Perform SMBus Block Process Call operation.

detaileddescription.para: This routine provides a generic interface to perform SMBus Block Process Call operation. This operation is basically Block Write followed by Block Read.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the device structure for the SMBus driver instance.
Address of the SMBus peripheral device.
Command byte which is sent to peripheral device first.
Size of the data block buffer to send.
Data block buffer send to the peripheral device.
Size of the data peripheral sent.
Data block buffer received from the peripheral device.
If successful.
General input / output error.
If function smbus_block_pcall() is not implemented by the driver.

briefdescription.para: Maximum number of bytes in SMBus Block protocol.
Structure initializer for smbus_dt_spec from devicetree.

detaileddescription.para: This helper macro expands to a static initializer for a struct smbus_dt_spec by reading the relevant bus and address data from the devicetree.

parameterdescription.para: Devicetree node identifier for the SMBus device whose struct smbus_dt_spec to create an initializer for

briefdescription.para: Structure initializer for smbus_dt_spec from devicetree instance.

detaileddescription.para: This is equivalent to SMBUS_DT_SPEC_GET(DT_DRV_INST(inst)).

parameterdescription.para: Devicetree instance number

memberdef.name: SMBUS_DEVICE_DT_DEFINE
memberdef.initializer: Z_SMBUS_DEVICE_STATE_DEFINE(node_id, \ Z_DEVICE_DT_DEV_NAME(node_id)); \ Z_SMBUS_INIT_FN(Z_DEVICE_DT_DEV_NAME(node_id), init_fn) \ Z_DEVICE_DEFINE(node_id, Z_DEVICE_DT_DEV_NAME(node_id), \ DEVICE_DT_NAME(node_id), \ &UTIL_CAT(Z_DEVICE_DT_DEV_NAME(node_id), _init),\ NULL, Z_DEVICE_DT_FLAGS(node_id), pm_device, \ data_ptr, cfg_ptr, level, prio, \ api_ptr, \ &(Z_DEVICE_STATE_NAME(Z_DEVICE_DT_DEV_NAME \ (node_id)).devstate), \ __VA_ARGS__)

briefdescription.para: Like DEVICE_DT_DEFINE() with SMBus specifics.

detaileddescription.para: Defines a device which implements the SMBus API. May generate a custom device_state container struct and init_fn wrapper when needed depending on SMBus CONFIG_SMBUS_STATS.

parameterdescription.para: The devicetree node identifier.
Name of the init function of the driver.
PM device resources reference (NULL if device does not use PM).
Pointer to the device's private data.
The address to the structure containing the configuration information for this instance of the driver.
The initialization level. See SYS_INIT() for details.
Priority within the selected initialization level. See SYS_INIT() for details.
Provides an initial pointer to the API function struct used by the driver. Can be NULL.

briefdescription.para: Like SMBUS_DEVICE_DT_DEFINE() for an instance of a DT_DRV_COMPAT compatible.

parameterdescription.para: instance number. This is replaced by DT_DRV_COMPAT(inst) in the call to SMBUS_DEVICE_DT_DEFINE().
other parameters as expected by SMBUS_DEVICE_DT_DEFINE().

briefdescription.para: Interfaces for System Management Bus (SMBus).
